km.Upton, Huntingdonshire, England: uពតុន, ខាមព្រីdហ្គeស៊ីរe, ប្រទេសអង់គ្លេស

zh.Upton, Huntingdonshire, England: 英國坎布利其爾厄普頓
zh.lifeSummary: Richard de Beville是Fulk de Beville的兒子，於大約1110年出生在英國坎布利其爾厄普頓。他至少有1個兒子。他去世於1176年在他的家鄉享年67歲。

zh-hans.Upton, Huntingdonshire, England: 英国坎布利其爾厄普頓
zh-hans.lifeSummary: Richard de Beville是Fulk de Beville的儿子，于大约1110年出生在英国坎布利其爾厄普頓。他至少有1个儿子。他去世于1176年在他的家乡享年67岁。

nameMeanings.name: de
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of American Family Names © Patrick Hanks 2003, 2006.
meanings: Some characteristic forenames:  Indian Dilip, Anirban, Gopal, Alok, Anindya, Arunava, Asit, Asok, Dibyendu, Goutam, Indra, Indranil.

variants.name: Dey
meanings: Some characteristic forenames:  Indian Ashit, Indu, Naina, Partha, Soumya, Ajit, Anjan, Anjana, Anup, Arjun, Arun, Ashim.
English, Scottish, and Welsh: variant of   Day  .
German: topographic name from a field name in North Rhine-Westphalia, denoting a sizeable piece of land, from Middle Low German dē ‘thigh’ (referring to the shape of the property).

nameMeanings.name: Beville
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of American Family Names © Patrick Hanks 2003, 2006.
meanings: English (Middlesex and Surrey; of Norman origin): variant of   Bovill  . Derivation from Beuville (Calvados) is also possible, though unproven.

French (also Béville): habitational name from Béville (Moselle) or Béville-le-Comte (Eure-et-Loir), or a variant of Beuville, a habitational name from Beuville (Calvados). The surname Béville is rare in France.

variants.name: Bevill
meanings: English (of Norman origin): variant of   Beville  .

variants.name: Bovill
meanings: English (of Norman origin): habitational name from any of several places in Normandy whose medieval forms share a similar range of variants, such as Bouville (Seine-Maritime), any of several places called Biéville (Calvados, Manche) or Biville (Manche, Seine-Maritime), Beuzeville-la-Giffard (Seine-Maritime), Boiville (Orne), and perhaps Boudeville (Seine-Maritime). See also   Boswell   and   Beville  .

nameMeanings.name: Richard
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of First Names © Patrick Hanks and Flavia Hodges 1990, 2003, 2006.
meanings: One of the most enduringly successful of the Old French personal names introduced into Britain by the Normans. It is of Germanic (Frankish) origin, derived from rīc ‘power’ + hard ‘strong, hardy’. It has enjoyed continuous popularity in England from the Conquest to the present day, influenced by the fact that it was borne by three kings of England, in particular Richard I ( 1157–99 ). He was king for only ten years ( 1189–99 ), most of which he spent in warfare abroad, taking part in the Third Crusade and costing the people of England considerable sums in taxes. Nevertheless, he achieved the status of a folk hero, and was never in England long enough to disappoint popular faith in his goodness and justice. He was also Duke of Aquitaine and Normandy and Count of Anjou, fiefs which he held at a time of maximum English expansion in France. His exploits as a leader of the Third Crusade earned him the nickname ‘Coeur de Lion’ or ‘Lionheart’ and a permanent place in popular imagination, in which he was even more firmly enshrined by Sir Walter Scott's novel Ivanhoe ( 1820 ).

variants.name: Rikert

His exploits as a leader of the Third Crusade earned him the nickname ‘Coeur de Lion’ or ‘Lionheart’ and a permanent place in popular imagination, in which he was even more firmly enshrined by Sir Walter Scott's novel Ivanhoe ( 1820 ).

en.lifeSummary: Richard de Beville was born about 1110, in Upton, Cambridgeshire, England as the son of Fulk de Beville. He had at least 1 son. He died in 1176, in his hometown, at the age of 67.

fr.lifeSummary: Richard de Beville est né environ 1110, à Upton, Cambridgeshire, Angleterre, fils de Fulk de Beville. Il a eu au moins 1 fils. Il est décédé en 1176, dans sa ville natale, à l’âge de 67 ans.

de.lifeSummary: Richard de Beville wurde um 1110 in Upton, Cambridgeshire, England, als Sohn von Fulk de Beville geboren. Er hatte mindestens 1 Sohn. Er starb 1176 im Alter von 67 Jahren in seinem Geburtsort.

it.lifeSummary: Richard de Beville è nato il circa 1110 nel Upton, Cambridgeshire, England come figlio di Fulk de Beville. Lui avuto almeno 1 figlio. Morì nel 1176, nel sua cittadina, all'età di 67 anni.

ja.Upton, Huntingdonshire, England: イギリスカンブリジェシュアイアウプトン
ja.lifeSummary: Richard de Bevilleは約1110年にイギリスカンブリジェシュアイアウプトンでFulk de Bevilleの息子として生まれた。彼は少なくとも1人の息子をもうけた。彼は1176年に故郷で67歳で死去した。

ko.lifeSummary: Richard de Beville(은)는 대략 1110년 영국 캄브리지실르 업턴에서 Fulk de Beville의 아들로 태어났다. 그는 적어도 한 명의 아들을 두었다. 그는 1176년 그의 고향에서 67세의 나이로 사망했다.

pt.lifeSummary: Richard de Beville nasceu aproximadamente 1110, em Upton, Cambridgeshire, Inglaterra filho de Fulk de Beville. Ele teve pelo menos 1 filho. Ele faleceu em 1176, em sua cidade natal, com 67 anos.

ru.lifeSummary: Richard de Beville родился около 1110 г. в местности уптон, камбриджешир, Англия. Его отца звали Fulk de Beville. У него был по крайней мере 1 сын. Он умер в 1176 г. в его родном городе в возрасте 67 лет.

es.lifeSummary: Richard de Beville nació aproximadamente 1110, en Upton, Cambridgeshire, Inglaterra como hijo de Fulk de Beville. Tuvo por lo menos 1 hijo. Murió en 1176, en su pueblo, a la edad de 67 años.
